Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Imperial Palace]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — The Imperial Palace is where the Chronicler in charge of finance works.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Naberius was the Chronicler in charge of financial records in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Naberius previously served in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The chapter house reception room is as well-appointed as the Imperial Palace.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Naberius Clayborn was assigned to the Imperial Palace for many years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The Silent One used to work in the Imperial Palace.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Imperial Palace contains the Emperor's personal rooms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder and his crew headed toward the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder and others travel to the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — The Imperial Palace is a location from which Calder and Jerri were released.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Calder is currently in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Optasia is only visible from the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — There have been recent attacks on the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Calder feels at home in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — A search of the Imperial Palace revealed no trace of Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Imperial Palace is a massive complex that functions like its own city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Imperial Palace contains the Emperor's personal armory.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — The Imperial Palace contains a tower with columns that is a hundred feet off the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Imperial Palace is a complex of buildings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Imperial Palace is the site of an attack by a Consultant saboteur.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor's Imperial Palace takes up almost a fifth of the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Imperial Palace was held by the Navigators and the Guard.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Imperial Palace has dungeons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Calder returned to the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The procession takes place within the Imperial Palace complex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperial Palace is massive and takes up almost twenty percent of the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Calder has been kept under observation in the Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — A battle occurred in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Imperial Palace is characterized by a red-tiled mass of roofs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Imperial Palace is the location where the Emperor's Stage is situated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The fall of the Imperial Palace would be caused by Calder's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Imperial Palace has fallen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Imperial Palace is a location where flagstones are spotted with Baldezar Kern's blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Independents may have taken the Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri was imprisoned in the Imperial Palace by Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Imperial Palace is a location where any Elderspawn attempting to crash through the walls by force would be annihilated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Imperial Palace is a location that Calder marched toward.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Imperial Palace has a roof.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperial Palace is a large structure in the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperial Palace is separated from the Capital by a wall containing the Rose Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Chaos erupted in the streets of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Elderspawn can be flushed out of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Some Gardeners died in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Gardeners had fought in the Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — Interion Darovish prepared a carriage to take him back to the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Palace is a location where petty crimes were being subsidized to strain the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Shera is positioned on an Imperial Palace roof.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Imperial Palace contains rooms that are impervious to eavesdroppers due to centuries of Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — The Imperial Palace is a location where Tyria resides in its depths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The Imperialists used tunnels to escape the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor was buried outside the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Shera travels along the red-tiled rooftops of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Norian works in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Awakened bell's ring echoed throughout the Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — A conference is held in a broad conference room of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Silver-blue mist filled the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Gardeners traveled along the rooftops of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera could see from the courtyard in the Imperial Palace to miles deep in the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Estyr was moved back to the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Palace contains a throne room.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — The Imperial Palace is a place where Eithan trespasses.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
